query:
SELECT 'unitAliases' AS tabela, COUNT(*) AS total_registros, SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS com_tenantId_1, SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outros_tenants FROM unitAliases
UNION ALL
SELECT 'productConversions', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM productConversions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'unitPendingQueue', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM unitPendingQueue
UNION ALL
SELECT 'labelAssociations', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId != 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM labelAssociations;

UNION ALL
